获取报价

About WishPower

专业绝缘子制造商 | 成立于2003年

WishPower是一家专注于高压绝缘子研发、生产和销售的高新技术企业。公司成立于2003年，拥有20年的专业制造经验。

我们致力于为全球电力传输与配电系统提供安全可靠的绝缘解决方案。产品广泛应用于电网、电站、铁路、新能源等领域。

公司拥有完善的质量管理体系，通过ISO9001:2015认证，产品符合IEC、ANSI、GB等国际标准，并出口到全球60多个国家和地区。

年行业经验

Wishpower Showcases Composite Insulation Materials at 2025 Power Industry Exhibition

Wishpower participated in a 2025 power industry exhibition, where customers explored composite insulation materials and high-voltage power products while Wishpower representative Ms. Yu introduced product features, applications, and technical advantages.

16 05月
Company News
Read More

Wishpower Attends 2025 Canada Power Industry Exhibition

Wishpower attended the 2025 Canada power industry exhibition to showcase high-voltage composite insulators, transformer bushings, surge arresters, and power transmission solutions for modern grid infrastructure.

Blog
Read More

What Are the Different Types of Transformer Bushings?

Learn the main types of transformer bushings, including porcelain bushings, oil-impregnated paper bushings, resin-impregnated paper bushings, composite bushings, condenser bushings, and dry-type transformer bushings.

11 05月
Blog
Read More

What Is a Composite Hollow Insulator? Structure, Benefits and Applications

Learn what a composite hollow insulator is, including its FRP tube, silicone rubber housing, main advantages, and applications in transformers, surge arresters, circuit breakers, GIS equipment, and high-voltage substations.

Blog
Read More

What Is a Polymer Insulator? Structure, Benefits and Applications

Learn what a polymer insulator is, including its FRP core, silicone rubber housing, metal end fittings, main advantages, and applications in power transmission lines, distribution networks, substations, and railway electrification systems.

11 05月
Blog
Read More

What Are the Disadvantages of Composite Insulators?

Composite insulators are widely used in modern power transmission and distribution systems because of their lightweight structure, high mechanical strength, good pollution resistance, and excellent hydrophobic performance. Compared with traditional porcelain and glass insulators, composite insulator

11 05月
Blog
Read More

Why would you use a dry transformer?

Benefits of Dry-Type TransformersDry-type transformers are widely used in commercial, industrial, public, and renewable energy applications because they are safe, efficient, environmentally friendly, and cost-effective. Unlike oil-filled transformers, dry-type transformers do not use insulating oil

11 05月
Blog
Read More

Is surge arrester same as lightning arrester?

Surge Arrester vs. Lightning Arrester: What Is the Difference?The terms surge arrester and lightning arrester are often used interchangeably in electrical systems, which can cause confusion. Although both devices are used to protect electrical equipment from overvoltage, they differ in function, des
